DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway.description: Remove the spending limit for the account.
Remove the auto top-up configuration for the account.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/bi.description: Retrieve the current credit balance, payment method info, and top-up configuration.
Retrieve a list of past invoices with pagination, optionally filtered by type.

parameters.description: Filter invoice type: auto, manual, or all.
parameters.name: type

schema.description: Filter invoice type: auto, manual, or all.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/bi.description: Retrieve a preview of the upcoming invoice including line items and tax.
Retrieve the current spending limit configuration for the account.
Retrieve the current auto top-up threshold, amount, and any error state.
Retrieve the minimum and maximum allowed top-up amounts (in cents) for this account.

min_cents.description: Minimum allowed top-up amount in cents.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/bi.description: Retrieve aggregated usage meter event summaries for the given time range.

parameters.description: Start time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
parameters.name: start_time

schema.description: Start time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

parameters.description: End time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.
parameters.name: end_time

schema.description: End time as Unix timestamp in milliseconds.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/b.description: Deprecated: spending limits can no longer be created, enabled, or modified and this endpoint always responds 403. Use the new AI Gateway spend limits instead: https://developers.cloudflare.com/ai-gateway/features/spend-limits/. Existing limits can be removed via DELETE /spending-limit.
Create a credit top-up via Stripe PaymentIntent for the given account.

onboarding.description: Whether the user was already onboarded.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/b.description: Configure auto top-up with a balance threshold and top-up amount.

threshold.description: Balance threshold in cents that triggers auto top-up (min 500).

POST /accounts/{account_id}/ai-gateway/b.description: Get the payment processing status of a top-up by its invoice ID.

payment_intent_id.description: Stripe invoice ID to check status for.
